data.body: FORCE_CLOSE: close gate(s) bypassed by user approval — no completion/signature attestation was signed. Reason: "Operator-approved rescope+close 2026-07-18. Deterministic half (mutant corpus, thresholds, assemble/benchmark harness seams, e2_counting helpers, golden tests) DESIGNED+BUILT as WIP on branch calib/6982-e2; intentionally NOT landed on main (harness only drives the rejected batch), so there is by design no referencing commit. The ~100-run LLM batch baseline is permanently rejected on cost and superseded by d8a5 (change #798, MERGED) standing criterion_effectiveness.py recorder ($0 marginal cost); history-mining is dead (~4 plan-v3 baselines vs ~200). Rationale + rescoped ACs recorded on-ticket.". Session: 0598b281-0286-4b2c-891c-cc5b4c94ba24.
